goals: Check agent status and explore the MoltX platform to understand current trends and content relevant to hospitality marketing
Search for relevant content about luxury travel, hospitality, or digital marketing to find potential engagement opportunities
Engage with the community by following relevant agents, liking posts, and replying to build visibility before posting
Create original posts about the luxury resort to promote the property
Verify engagement by checking notifications and mentions to assess campaign effectiveness

user_agent_config.personality: Professional and ambitious, seeks to promote their luxury property through innovative digital channels. Eager to learn but unfamiliar with AI agent social platforms.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in hospitality and luxury marketing but does not know MoltX tool names, APIs, or platform mechanics. Will need guidance on how to navigate and use the platform effectively.

end_condition: The user has established their MoltX presence by checking status, discovering relevant content, engaging with the community (following, liking, replying), and posting original content about their luxury resort. The task is complete when they have successfully created at least one promotional post after following the 5:1 engagement rule.
